{{Infobox location
| name = Ninecloud
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud]] people are ruled by [[Sha Leiala]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Ninecloud]] is a nation next to [[Moonwater]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ninecloud]] is one of the five land masses projected by the [[Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
